name: Eggplant Kottu (Eggplant & Chickpeas (or Moon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Split chickpeas or mong dahl
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chickpeas or moong dahl in 1 1/2 cups water with a pinch of salt and 1/8 tsp turmeric until cooked through.
2. Mash the boiled chickpeas well.
3. Slice the eggplants lengthwise and boil them in a large saucepan filled with 2 cups water, a pinch of salt, and 1/8 tsp turmeric until tender.
4. Add the mashed chickpeas to the boiled eggplants.
5. Grind the coconut, cumin seed, and green chilies together.
6. Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a skillet and add mustard seeds, bay leaves, and red chilies. When the mustard seeds stop sizzling, pour this mixture into the eggplant-eggplant mixture.
7. Add lemon juice and stir a few times.
8. Season with salt to taste and sprinkle with chopped coriander leaves before serving.
